fields.label: Google credential JSON
fields.help: Recommended: in Google Cloud Console, open IAM & Admin > Service Accounts, select or create a service account, then open Keys > Add key > Create new key > JSON and paste the entire downloaded file. In Google Analytics, add its client_email under Admin > Account or Property access management. An authorized_user JSON with a refresh token is also accepted.

fields.label: Default GA4 property ID
fields.help: Optional. In Google Analytics, open Admin > Property settings and copy the numeric Property ID. It is also shown in the property selector. Used when a tool call omits propertyId.

fields.label: Measurement ID
fields.help: Optional. For web, open Google Analytics > Admin > Data streams, select the web stream, and copy its Measurement ID (G-...). For apps, copy the Firebase App ID from Firebase Console > Project settings > Your apps.

fields.label: Measurement Protocol API secret
fields.help: Optional. Open Google Analytics > Admin > Data streams, select the matching stream, open Measurement Protocol API secrets, choose Create, and paste the generated Secret value. Configure this together with Measurement ID.

fields.label: Measurement region
fields.help: Choose the global or EU collection endpoint.
